resource.name: DlgSaveChanges
resource.object: Do you want to save changes?

resource.name: DlgDelete
resource.object: Are you sure that you want to delete?

resource.name: DlgCorrectingValue
resource.object: Do you want to correct the value?

resource.name: edPrgShortName.ToolTip
resource.object: Short name for the cut program

resource.name: PrgUncutMaterialLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Product to use for uncut product

resource.name: chkNeverOverwrite.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if program in device may not be overridden

resource.name: lblHDSInfo.Text
resource.object: Filter out product ends with less width than:

resource.name: chkEnableContinous.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if product is a continuous piece

resource.name: chkAutoUpdateVTW.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if volume-to-weight limits is automatically updated

resource.name: chkBatchByWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Enables that the batch is divided by weight

resource.name: chkUseReversedLabelling.ToolTip
resource.object: Do reversed analysis of L/V detection.

resource.name: PromptToManyFormgrades
resource.object: You can not have more than 5 form grades in a program!

resource.name: FeatureMinBiggerMax
resource.object: Feature '{0}' has min greater than max.

resource.name: X_ValueRange
resource.object: Value of X must be between {0:F1} and {1:F1}.

resource.name: Y_ValueRange
resource.object: Value of Y must be between {0:F1} and {1:F1}.

resource.name: PromptToManyCutgrades
resource.object: You can not have more than 5 cut grades in a program.

resource.name: RemoveAllPortionTableItems
resource.object: Do you want to remove all items from the table?

resource.name: Info.SelectDevice
resource.object: Select device to import vision from.

resource.name: Err.OnlyICut300
resource.object: Vision can only be imported for I-Cut 300/600

resource.name: Info.SelectDevice
resource.object: Select device to import program from:

resource.name: Err.ImportFileFailed
resource.object: Failed to import program from file.

resource.name: PrgActivity.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to change activity and set the new active program to:

resource.name: PrgActivity.NoAllowed
resource.object: You are not allowed to change activity!

resource.name: Err.NoRemoteClient
resource.object: Failed to establish a remote connection to portioning server!

resource.name: ClearData.Txt
resource.object: Clears monitor data from UI and server.\n\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: btnRefresh.Hint
resource.object: To request a status and data from lane

resource.name: btnClear.Hint
resource.object: Clears monitor data both in UI and server

resource.name: btnConnect.Hint
resource.object: To requests a connection to portioning server

resource.name: selectProgramLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: To choose program to activate for lane

resource.name: btnStartLogging.ToolTip
resource.object: Start or stop lane piece and portion logging.

resource.name: lblGraderStatus.ToolTip
resource.object: State of the grader which is placed after the portioning machine

resource.name: edGraderStatus.ToolTip
resource.object: State of the grader which is placed after the portioning machine.

resource.name: txtChartName.Text
resource.object: Average number of slices per portion

resource.name: txtGraphWarning.Text
resource.object: To many weight groups to display!

resource.name: Info.SelectDevice
resource.object: Select device containing the program to import model settings from.

resource.name: Err.OnlyICut300
resource.object: Model can only be imported for I-Cut 300/600

resource.name: chkAutoConnect.ToolTip
resource.object: If active then the program will try automatically to connect to the lane if the connection is down.

resource.name: chkDataPull.ToolTip
resource.object: If active then program will automatically pull for data from server.

resource.name: edHistorySize.ToolTip
resource.object: Set how many minutes backwards from current time to show.

resource.name: chkShowGraderState.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if the grader state window shall be shown.

resource.name: chkShowLogger.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if the logger window shall be visible.

resource.name: btnApplyProgram.Hint
resource.object: Applies changes to currently active program

resource.name: btnImportModel.Hint
resource.object: Read form grade models from device.

resource.name: btnImportVisionFromFile.Hint
resource.object: Imports vision settings from a file

resource.name: btnOptionsCopy.Hint
resource.object: Creates a copy of current program

resource.name: btnOptionsDefLayout.Hint
resource.object: Restores all user settings on the UI.

resource.name: btnOptionsPaste.Hint
resource.object: Paste copied program to current lane

resource.name: selectLaneLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select lane to create program for

resource.name: selectProgramLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: List of programs for the selected lane

resource.name: btnExportPrgToDevice.Hint
resource.object: Exports the program to the device

resource.name: ImportingProgramType.Err
resource.object: Failed to import program type from file.

resource.name: ExportingProgramType.Err
resource.object: Failed to export program type to file.

resource.name: Err.ReadProgramType
resource.object: No program config found for this lane in database.

resource.name: CantImport.Text
resource.object: Please finish or close the export window.

resource.name: CantExport.Text
resource.object: Please finish or close the import window

resource.name: RemovePrgType.Err
resource.object: Failed to remove program type from device!

resource.name: RemovePrgType.Text
resource.object: Do you want to remove the program type setup for\nthe device this lane is connected to?

resource.name: AddProgramError.Text
resource.object: No more program numbers available.\nNew record will have number 0.

resource.name: Info.SelectDevice
resource.object: Select device to download form settings from.

resource.name: Err.ImportFileFailed
resource.object: Failed to import form from file.

resource.name: chkAutoUpdateVTW.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if volume-to-weight limits is automatically updated

resource.name: edQLProgram.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the QL program to use.

resource.name: cbPPVelocity.ToolTip
resource.object: Choose the speed of the plate.

resource.name: edTPFormingLoad.ToolTip
resource.object: To set how much force the top piston should exert upon the product during forming face.

resource.name: edTPFormingTime.ToolTip
resource.object: To set how long time the force should be maintained during the forming face.

resource.name: edTPCutLoad.ToolTip
resource.object: To select how much force the top piston should exert during the cutting process.

resource.name: edFSWidth.ToolTip
resource.object: User width settings for the mould.

resource.name: edFSHeight.ToolTip
resource.object: User height set. for the mould.

resource.name: edFSLength.ToolTip
resource.object: User length set for the mould.

resource.name: edFSArea.ToolTip
resource.object: User area settings for the mould.

resource.name: edFSFactor.ToolTip
resource.object: Factor used to compensate for error in the forming process.

resource.name: edWLTarget.ToolTip
resource.object: Set target of the weight lmit.

resource.name: bellyMaterialLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product for all belly trim in this program.

resource.name: trimMaterialLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product for all other trim in this program.

resource.name: Err.PatternNameInUse
resource.object: Pattern name is currently in use!

resource.name: txtGraphWarning.Text
resource.object: To many weight groups to display!

resource.name: pieceMaterialLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select a product for the piece

resource.name: PrgNoOutOfRange.Err
resource.object: Invalid program number - out of range

resource.name: PrgNoExists.Err
resource.object: Program number already exists.\nPlease select another number.

resource.name: btnSetDefAll.ToolTip
resource.object: Set user default as value for all parameters

resource.name: btnGetDefAll.ToolTip
resource.object: Get value from all parameters and set as user default value.

resource.name: GetDefAll.Text
resource.object: Do you want to get default user settings\nand override current settings in the program?

resource.name: PrgNoNotExtendable.Err
resource.object: This program number can't use extended parameters.\nValid programs are:

resource.name: btnSetDef.ToolTip
resource.object: Set value as user default value.

resource.name: btnGetDef.ToolTip
resource.object: Get user default value and set as value.

resource.name: Info.TypeProgram
resource.object: Type number of the program to import

resource.name: lblWarning.Text
resource.object: Warning: An existing program with same program number will be overwritten.

resource.name: Err.ImportFileFailed
resource.object: Failed to import program from file.

resource.name: lblWarning.Text
resource.object: Warning: An existing program with same program number will be overwritten.

resource.name: PrgNoOutOfRange.Err
resource.object: Invalid program number - Out of range!

resource.name: PrgNoExists.Err
resource.object: Program number already exists!\nPlease select another number.

resource.name: PrgNoZero.Err
resource.object: Program number not defined!\nPlease select a number.

resource.name: SubsetNotExist.Err
resource.object: This subset does not exist. Please select another.

resource.name: ProgramCantDelete.ErrMsg
resource.object: This program is a standard program, and can't be deleted.

resource.name: Info.ExportToDeviceCap
resource.object: Export to device is not needed.

resource.name: Info.ExportToDevice
resource.object: Every time activity changes, a complete export to the Salmon slicer device(s) is performed.

resource.name: Imported.InfoText
resource.object: Please check that all imported programs are valid\nand correct any invalid values.

resource.name: NoSubsetNo.ErrMsg
resource.object: All free parameter subset numbers have been used. Please delete some existing sets before creating a new set again.

resource.name: SubsetNoInUse.ErrMsg
resource.object: This speed parameter subset is currently in use and therefore can't be deleted.

resource.name: SubsetNoCantDelete.ErrMsg
resource.object: This speed parameter subset is a standard set, and can't be deleted.

resource.name: Info.SelectDevice
resource.object: Select device to import program from:

resource.name: Err.ImportFileFailed
resource.object: Failed to import program from file.

resource.name: Info.ExportToDeviceCap
resource.object: Export to device is not needed.

resource.name: Info.ExportToDevice
resource.object: Every time activity changes, a complete export to the Salmon Slicer device(s) is performed.

resource.name: piecetype Name.hint
resource.object: Choose the piecetype to accociate with the lane

resource.name: chkAutoUpdateVTW.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if volume-to-weight limits is automatically updated

resource.name: chkBatchByWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Enables that the batch is divided by weight

resource.name: Warning.PrgDelete
resource.object: WARNING:\nThis action can not be undone.\nAll associated statistic will be come useless.

resource.name: Err.DeleteProgramFromDeviceMsg
resource.object: Failed to delete the program from device. Deletion aborted.

resource.name: Err.DeletingLaneChildren
resource.object: Can't delete children of the lane.

resource.name: Warning.DeleteSystem
resource.object: WARNING:\nDeleting this speed will delete lanes and programs for the speed!\nThis delete can not be undone!

resource.name: btnGetRawMaterial.Hint
resource.object: Imports all raw materials from the device.

resource.name: RawImport.WrongDeviceType
resource.object: The selected device is not supported for raw material import.

resource.name: RawImport.Confirm.Info
resource.object: This operation will remove raw data currently in the database for this device.

resource.name: RawImport.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to continue and import raw material settings from the device?

resource.name: btnGetAlarms.Hint
resource.object: Imports all alarms from the device.

resource.name: AlarmImport.WrongDeviceTyp
resource.object: The selected device do not support alarms import.

resource.name: AlarmImport.Complete.Text
Pos_ValueRange
resource.object: Value of Position must be between {0:F1} and {1:F1}.

resource.name: Press_ValueRange
resource.object: Value of Pressuremust be between {0:F1} and {1:F1}.

resource.name: Pos_ValueRange
resource.object: Value of Position must be between {0:F1} and {1:F1}.

resource.name: Depth_ValueRange
resource.object: Value of Depth must be between {0:F1} and {1:F1}.

resource.name: NoSubsetNo.ErrMsg
resource.object: All free parameter subset numbers have been used. Please delete some existing sets before creating a new set again.

resource.name: SubsetNoInUse.ErrMsg
resource.object: This system parameter subset is currently in use and therefore can't be deleted.

resource.name: SubsetNoCantDelete.ErrMsg
resource.object: This system parameter subset is a standard set, and can't be deleted.

resource.name: btnImportMaterials.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to import raw materials from the current lane.

resource.name: btnExportMaterials.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to export selected raw materials to the current lane.

resource.name: lblInfo.Text
resource.object: * Active, (#) Changed but not synced, (*) Unsaved data

resource.name: lblMaterialName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the name of the raw material.

resource.name: btnAddFactor.ToolTip
resource.object: Add a factor to the list

resource.name: btnDelFactor.ToolTip
resource.object: Delete selected factor from the list.

resource.name: edFactorValue.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in or flip to the required value. Min: 0.5 Max: 1.5

resource.name: edFactor.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in or flip to the required value. Min: 0 Max: 100

resource.name: RawImport.WrongDeviceTyp
resource.object: The selected device is not supported for raw material import.

resource.name: RawExport.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to export the selected raw material data to the device\nand overwrite data currently stored on the device?

resource.name: RawExport.WrongDeviceType
resource.object: The selected device is not supported for raw material export.

resource.name: edName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the name of the raw material.

resource.name: edDensity.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the global density factor.

resource.name: Name.Invalid
resource.object: is already in use. Please enter different name.

resource.name: Name.Empty
resource.object: Please enter name for the material.

resource.name: chkLocked.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if this raw material shall be locked for editing.

resource.name: RawImport.Confirm.Info
resource.object: This operation will remove raw data currently in the database for this device.

resource.name: RawImport.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to continue and import raw material settings from the device?

resource.name: btnSave.ToolTip
resource.object: Save the data without closing the dialog.

resource.name: lblInfo.Text
resource.object: Note: Only set the gates which are active on the machine.

resource.name: Error.LimitOutOfRange
resource.object: The value shall be between 0 and 99999.

resource.name: btnClearAll.ToolTip
resource.object: Sets limits to zero on all gates.

resource.name: SelectFromListOrCtrl0ToErase
resource.object: Select from list, or <ctrlt> + '0' (zero) to erase.

resource.name: JobProfile.Load.Failed
resource.object: Failed to load job profile for program.

resource.name: ProductProfile.Load.Failed
resource.object: Failed to load product profile for program.

resource.name: ConfirmSave.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save the data?

resource.name: Copy.Info
resource.object: Data need to be saved before copy or clone can be done.

resource.name: ExportSave.Text
resource.object: Data needs to saved before export.

resource.name: Feature.Error
resource.object: Following settings are not supported for the selected lane.

resource.name: Feature.Question
resource.object: Shall the invalid settings be removed from the program?

resource.name: InvalidProgram.ProgramErrorFoundByMachine
resource.object: Following error found in program by the machine:

resource.name: PleaseRetryValidateFunctionToGetExactDescription
resource.object: Please retry the validate function to get exact description

resource.name: selKnifeAngle.ToolTip
resource.object: Set the angle of the knife.

resource.name: forkDistance.ToolTip
resource.object: Set the distance of the fork from the knife.

resource.name: outfeedSpeed.ToolTip
resource.object: Set the speed of the outfeed belt.

resource.name: chkBeltSameSpeed.ToolTip
resource.object: If checked then infeed and outfeed belt have the same speed.

resource.name: infeedSpeed.ToolTip
resource.object: Set the speed of the infeed belt.

resource.name: LongItemMode.Text
resource.object: On activate a long item static zone will be added to first cut profile and V/J zone in that profile removed.\nOther Cut profiles will be removed as well.\nDo you want to activate the long item mode?

resource.name: selKnifeRpm.ToolTip
resource.object: Set the rotation speed of the knife in RPM.

resource.name: localKnifeOffsetLane1.ToolTip
resource.object: Positive offset will make the knife wait longer before cutting

resource.name: localKnifeOffsetLane.ToolTip
resource.object: Positive offset will make the knife wait longer before cutting

resource.name: DeleteFilter
resource.object: Do you want to delete this filter?

resource.name: DeleteCutProfile
resource.object: Do you want to delete this cut profile?

resource.name: Valid.InvalidNSProduct
resource.object: No product selected for Non Specified cuts.

resource.name: Info.SelectItem
resource.object: Please select cut, filter or add operation

resource.name: Valid.InvalidSkippedProduct
resource.object: No product selected for Skipped cuts.

resource.name: NoCutProduct
resource.object: No product assigned to cut in cut profile {0} in zone {1}.

resource.name: SimBusy
resource.object: Simulator service busy, try again later

resource.name: rawMaterialLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select Raw Material to base the program on.

resource.name: btnEditProducts.ToolTip
resource.object: To view piece, N/S and skipped products.

resource.name: btnFilterProducts.ToolTip
resource.object: To filter what is in the product list by the type of the input product.

resource.name: btnEditRawMaterials.ToolTip
resource.object: Opens an editor to edit raw materials.

resource.name: rawMaterialLookup.EditButtonToolTip
resource.object: Click to invoke the Raw Material editor.

resource.name: rawMaterialLookup2.EditButtonToolTip
resource.object: Click to invoke the Raw Material editor for lane 2.

resource.name: rawMaterialLookup2.ToolTip
resource.object: Select Raw Material to base the program on for lane 2.

resource.name: MaterialLookup1.EditButtonToolTip
resource.object: Click to invoke the Raw Material editor for lane 1.

resource.name: btnMoveUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Move the selected item one place up

resource.name: btnMoveDown.ToolTip
resource.object: Move the selected item one place down

resource.name: DeleteCutZone
resource.object: Do you want to delete this cut zone?

resource.name: DeleteCut
resource.object: Do you want to delete this cut?"

resource.name: rawMaterialLookup.EditButtonToolTip
resource.object: Click to invoke the Raw Material editor.

resource.name: btnByPercent.Text
resource.object: Zone is absolute or by procent.

resource.name: Close.Question
resource.object: Do you want to save data?

resource.name: btnByPercent.ToolTip
resource.object: Zone is absolute or by procent.

resource.name: Close.Question
resource.object: Do you want to save data?

resource.name: btnVCut.ToolTip
resource.object: Select the V-Cut type for zone.

resource.name: btnJCut.ToolTip
resource.object: Select the J-Cut type for zone.

resource.name: beltContribution.ToolTip
resource.object: Set how much the infeed belt contributes to the spacing.

resource.name: offsetOpenWallFld.ToolTip
resource.object: Sets the offset for open wall.

resource.name: offsetCloseWallFld.ToolTip
resource.object: Sets the offset for close wall.

resource.name: rollerSpeedFactorFld.ToolTip
resource.object: Sets the roller speed factor on the outfeed.

resource.name: Fixed.Info
resource.object: Use this cutting pattern to order portions of a fixed size.

resource.name: Split.Info
resource.object: Use this cutting pattern to divide the product into a given number of portions which are all equally heavy or long (cutting by weight or length, respectively).

resource.name: Flex.Info
resource.object: This cutting pattern is used in order to obtain a better utilization of the product material. The flexibility is that the portion size only needs to be within a specified range.

resource.name: Trim.Info
resource.object: Choose this cutting pattern if you want to start (or end) by trimming a part of the zone.

resource.name: Rest.Info
resource.object: With this cutting pattern, it is possible to specify where a possible Rest portion should be placed and how.

resource.name: Priority.Info
resource.object: Here you can specify a prioritized order of portions which must meet a number of requirements regarding size.

resource.name: Batch.Info
resource.object: A batch is a group of portions that are to be packed or otherwise handled together, as one unit.

resource.name: Optimized.Info
resource.object: The purpose of this pattern is to cut the portions that will maximize the price you can get for the resulting portions from each item processed.

resource.name: Demand.Info
resource.object: The purpose of the demand pattern is to let external equipment decide what to do with all or parts of a raw material.

resource.name: productLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product to attach the cut to.

resource.name: gateLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select destination gate for the cut.

resource.name: btnAllowRest.ToolTip
resource.object: Select to allow absorption of rest.

resource.name: edPortions.ToolTip
resource.object: Define how many portions should be cut.

resource.name: TargetWeight.ToolTip.Length
resource.object: Define the target length for each portion cut.

resource.name: TargetWeight.ToolTip.Weight
resource.object: Define the target weight for each portion cut.

resource.name: edGateOffset.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines extra offset for the gate.

resource.name: Close.Question
resource.object: Do you want to save data?

resource.name: Validate.Product.Question
resource.object: Please select a product for the cut.

resource.name: MinPortionSize.ToolTip
resource.object: Set the minimum size the portion can have.

resource.name: productLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product to attach the cut to.

resource.name: gateLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select destination gate for the cut.

resource.name: btnAllowRest.ToolTip
resource.object: Select to allow absorption of rest.

resource.name: edPortions.ToolTip
resource.object: Define how many portions should be cut.

resource.name: chkForcedTarget.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if the target shall be forced.

resource.name: WeightLimits.ToolTip.Length
resource.object: Define the length limits for the target, as range value.

resource.name: WeightLimits.ToolTip.Weight
resource.object: Define the weight limits for the target, as range value.

resource.name: edGateOffset.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines extra offset for the gate.

resource.name: UpperError
resource.object: Minimum value can not be higher than the maximum value.

resource.name: LowerError
resource.object: Maximum value can not be lower that the minium value.

resource.name: InvalidInput
resource.object: Invalid input. Example of input: 0-100 or -10 - -5.

resource.name: productLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product to attach the cut to.

resource.name: gateLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select destination gate for the cut.

resource.name: btnAllowRest.ToolTip
resource.object: Select to allow absorption of rest.

resource.name: edRefPointDistance.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the distance to the reference point.

resource.name: edPercOfDiameter.CaptionText
resource.object: Percentage Of Diameter At Reference Point:

resource.name: edPercOfDiameter.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the percentage of the diameter at reference point.

resource.name: btnCriterionMet.ToolTip
resource.object: Select between one criterion is met or all criterion met. If on then all criterion are met.

resource.name: edDiameter.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the diameter on trim item.

resource.name: edGateOffset.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines extra offset for the gate.

resource.name: productLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product to attach the cut to.

resource.name: gateLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select destination gate for the cut.

resource.name: edGateOffset.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines extra offset for the gate.

resource.object: Select product to attach the batch to.

resource.name: gateLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select destination gate for the batch.

resource.name: btnAllowRest.ToolTip
resource.object: Select to allow absorption of rest.

resource.name: edPortions.ToolTip
resource.object: Define number of portion in batch.

resource.name: edInfeedContribution.ToolTip
resource.object: Set how much the infeed belt contributes to the spacing.

resource.name: btnMoveUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Move selected priority up one position.

resource.name: btnMoveDown.ToolTip
resource.object: Move selected priority down one position.

resource.name: productLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product to attach the cut to.

resource.name: gateLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select destination gate for the cut.

resource.name: btnAllowRest.ToolTip
resource.object: Select to allow absorption of rest.

resource.name: edPortions.ToolTip
resource.object: Define how many portions should be cut.

resource.name: Delete.Question
resource.object: Do you want to delete the selected item?

resource.name: edGateOffset.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines extra offset for the gate.

resource.name: btnMoveUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Move selected candidate up one position.

resource.name: btnMoveDown.ToolTip
resource.object: Move selected candidate down one position.

resource.name: productLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product to attach the cut to.

resource.name: gateLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select destination gate for the cut.

resource.name: btnAllowRest.ToolTip
resource.object: Select to allow absorption of rest.

resource.name: btnByTarget.ToolTip
resource.object: Cut by target weight or range.

resource.name: edPriceToWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the price to weight ratio.

resource.name: edPortionPerRawMaterial.CaptionText
resource.object: No. Of Portions Per Raw Material

resource.name: edPortionPerRawMaterial.ToolTip
resource.object: Define maximum number of portions per raw material.

resource.name: edMaxPortionInTotal.ToolTip
resource.object: Define maximum number of portions in total.

resource.name: Validate.LeftOverProduct
resource.object: Please select product for left over item.

resource.name: Delete.Question
resource.object: Do you want to delete the selected item?

resource.name: btnLocation.ToolTip
resource.object: Select if candidate shall be locked to either front or end of the item cut.

resource.name: edGateOffset.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines extra offset for the gate.

resource.name: Err.SelectProgram
resource.object: Please select one or more programs.

resource.name: Err.StoreFailed
resource.object: Failed to store the program in device.

resource.name: Err.SeeLog
resource.object: See system log for more description.

resource.name: btnImport.ToolTip
resource.object: Select a file and import it.

resource.name: Import.ToRecord
resource.object: File imported to a new record.

resource.name: Prompt.Info
resource.object: This import will overwrite the program currently being edited.

resource.name: Info.SelectDevice
resource.object: Select device to import program from.

resource.name: Err.NoDeviceRecord
resource.object: Unable to load device information from database.

resource.name: Err.SelectProgram
resource.object: Please select one or more programs.

resource.name: Err.SeeLog
resource.object: See system log for more description.

resource.name: chkCreateDefProducts.ToolTip
resource.object: Check this box to create default products for cuts in imported program.

resource.name: beltContribution.ToolTip
resource.object: Set how much the infeed belt contributes to the spacing.

resource.name: productLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select product to attach the cut to.

resource.name: gateLookup.ToolTip

resource.object: Select to allow absorption of rest.

resource.name: edGateOffset.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines extra offset for the gate.

resource.name: Ex.NoFlexicutData
resource.object: Failed to get Flexicut setup or program data.

resource.name: Ex.NoICut130Data
resource.object: Failed to get ICut setup or jobprofile.

resource.object: Do you want to save the data?

resource.name: Copy.Info
resource.object: Data need to be saved before copy or clone can be done.

resource.name: ExportSave.Text
resource.object: Data needs to saved before export.

resource.name: pieceProduct.ToolTip
resource.object: Select the piece product for the program.

resource.name: edBeltSpeed.ToolTip
resource.object: Set the speed of the belt by some defined constant.

resource.name: DeleteCutPattern
resource.object: Do you want to delete this cut?

resource.name: edGradeName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the name of the grade. Have to be unique within the program.

resource.name: btnSelect.ToolTip
resource.object: Copies selected products to your product list.

resource.name: btnAdd.ToolTip
resource.object: Add new product to the gobal list.

resource.name: btnAdd.ToolTip
resource.object: Opens the global product list to select products from.

resource.name: btnMoveUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Move the selected item one place up

resource.name: btnMoveDown.ToolTip
resource.object: Move the selected item one place down

resource.name: edSelProduct.ToolTip
resource.object: Select a product for the item.

resource.name: edProductName.Description
resource.object: A unique name have to be given.

resource.name: edProductName.ToolTip
resource.object: The name is automatically set when product is selected. But you can also change this name if you want.

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: Optional: A short description of the item. Will be shown in tooltips in the list.

resource.name: edDestination.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the gate number the product shall be feed out of.

resource.name: Validate.Name.Error
resource.object: The product name is already in use.

resource.name: Close.Question
resource.object: Do you want to save data?

resource.name: Validate.Weigth.Target
resource.object: Weigth target is not between min and max values.

resource.name: Validate.Length.Target
resource.object: Length target is not between min and max values.

resource.name: Validate.Weight.Values
resource.object: Some of the weight criteria values not set.

resource.name: Validate.Length.Values
resource.object: Some of the length criteria values not set.

resource.name: Validate.Width.Values
resource.object: Some of the width criteria values not set.

resource.name: Validate.Height.Values
resource.object: Some of the thickness criteria values not set.

resource.name: pieceProduct.ToolTip
resource.object: Select the piece product for the program.

resource.name: nonSpecProduct.ToolTip
resource.object: Select the product for non specified (N/S) cuts.

resource.name: skippedProduct.ToolTip
resource.object: Select the product for skipped cuts.

resource.name: PortioningYieldByPieceWeightGraphViewHint
resource.object: Displays the Yield by Piece Weight chart

resource.name: RunThroughputHint
resource.object: Displays the running throughput of pieces for the last X minutes as configured in the portioning system lane.

resource.name: SimpleThroughputHint
resource.object: Displays the throughput of pieces for the current process period.

resource.name: SimpleInputHint
resource.object: Displays the amount of input has been processed.

resource.name: FillBellyHeightHint
resource.object: Shows the difference in % betwenn the height of the left belly and right belly.

resource.name: LineYieldHint
resource.object: Display yield for the whole slicer line

resource.name: LineGiveawayHint
resource.object: Display giveaway for the whole slicer line

resource.name: LineThroughputHint
resource.object: Display throughput for the whole slicer line

resource.name: LaneYieldHint
resource.object: Display yield for the selected slicer lane

resource.name: LaneThroughputHint
resource.object: Display throughput for the selected slicer lane

resource.name: FinishedProductsHint
resource.object: Display how many items have been generated in the current prperiod. Shows also progress towards ordered amount.

resource.name: LineInweight.Hint
resource.object: Display total fillet weight for the whole slicer line

resource.name: LaneInweight.Hint
resource.object: Display total fillet weight for the slicer

resource.name: RejectGaugeHint
resource.object: Show current reject in a gauge

resource.name: ThroughputGaugeHint
resource.object: Show current througput in a gauge

resource.name: edPriceToWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the price to weight ratio.

resource.name: edPortionPerRawMaterial.CaptionText
resource.object: No. Of Portions Per Raw Material:

resource.name: edPortionPerRawMaterial.ToolTip
resource.object: Define maximum number of portions per raw material.

resource.name: edCutSurfaceDiameterRatio.ToolTip
resource.object: Define minimum cut surface diameter ratio.

resource.name: DeleteMsg
resource.object: Are you sure that you want to delete?

resource.name: InvalidProgramByMachine
resource.object: Following error found in program by machine:

resource.name: InvalidProgram.ProgramErrorFoundByMachine
resource.object: Following error found in program by machine:

resource.name: PleaseRetryValidateFunctionToGetExactDescription
resource.object: Please retry the validate function to get exact description

resource.name: Copy.Info
resource.object: Data needs to be saved before copy or clone can be done

resource.name: ConfirmSave.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save the data?

resource.name: Err.CantPasteProgram
resource.object: Cant paste program, copied program not found

resource.name: ExportSave.Text
resource.object: Data needs to saved before export.

resource.name: ValidateSave.Text
resource.object: Data needs to saved before validation
